unchanged_findings.evidence_hint: Detected environment variable usage on line 6: 'OPENAI_API_KEY=your-openai-api-key-here'
unchanged_findings.recommended_review: Never hardcode API keys. Verify that this key is supplied securely at runtime via secrets manager (AWS Secrets Manager, Doppler, etc.).

unchanged_findings.evidence_hint: Detected environment variable usage on line 7: 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=placeholder-value-for-anthropic-key'
unchanged_findings.recommended_review: Ensure API key is removed from repository commits immediately. Verify secrets distribution mechanism.
Verify usage complies with company data privacy policy. Ensure no proprietary data is sent to external LLMs without explicit authorization.
LangChain pipelines dynamically construct chains. Trace all active prompts and integrations to ensure there are no un-monitored model connections.
Review prompt content to verify there are no hidden jailbreak vulnerabilities, bias, or leakage risks. Ensure user instructions are sanitised.
LlamaIndex connects files to LLMs. Audit all document parsing pipelines and local index stores to prevent leaking restricted intellectual property.
Ensure persistent database directories are located in secure environments. Block unauthorized exports.
